name: python3-pymongo-ext
title: python3-pymongo-ext
summary: C-coded extension to the python3-pymongo package
description:
C-coded extension to the python3-pymongo package
Pymongo provides an interface to easily access MongoDB from Python 3.
This package contains an extension written in C for higher performance.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pymongo-ext because C-coded extension to the python3-pymongo package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pymongo-ext as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pymongo-ext with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pymongo-ext --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
